headline: Is Autodesk (ADSK) One of the Best Big Tech Stocks to Buy According to Wall Street Analysts?
summary: Autodesk, Inc. (NASDAQ:ADSK) is one of the best big tech stocks to buy according to Wall Street analysts. BNP Paribas initiated coverage of Autodesk, Inc. (NASDAQ:ADSK) with an Outperform rating on June 18 and set a price target of $295. The company also received a rating update from Citi on June 1, with the firm lifting […]

headline: Is Autodesk’s (ADSK) $350 Million AI Education Push Quietly Reshaping Its Ecosystem Moat?
summary: In June 2026, Autodesk announced a US$350 million, three-year commitment to expand free access to its professional tools, AI-focused training, and certifications for designers, engineers, builders, manufacturers, creatives, and skilled tradespeople worldwide, targeting 60 million additional students and educators by 2028 and nearly one million learners for AI-powered “Design and Make” skills. This move deepens Autodesk’s role in shaping the future workforce by embedding its software into...
